familyRead: Fusion was roughly competitive with the best single signal on this family, but the gain looked marginal rather than clearly practical.

Fusion showed complementary value on this family by recovering some onset-hit cases that the singles missed, but the overall lift remained modest; RMS-normalized mean looks helpful as a secondary boundary cue rather than a dominant standalone detector. (normalized-mean median onset hit rate 0.125)
